Class TileManager.Tile

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.TileManager.Tile
Enclosing class:
TileManager
public class TileManager.Tile extends Object
Inner class representing a single type of tile (e.g., grass, wall).

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    boolean
    collision
    Flag indicating if this tile type blocks entity movement (true for walls, false for floor).
    BufferedImage
    image
    The visual image associated with this tile type.
